title: Investigation into Bengaluru Cyber Fraud Collective
summary:
The Bengaluru Cyber Fraud Collective, led by Ashok Kumari, is a cyber fraud syndicate operating across Bengaluru Urban, Bengaluru Rural. Intelligence analysis has linked this network to 7 registered cases spanning 2023-03 to 2024-11. The syndicate comprises 8 identified members including Ravi Rao, Sneha Prasad, Priya Kattimani, Vasantha Kumar and 4 others. Primary criminal activities include cyber crime.

Financial surveillance has flagged 2 suspicious transactions totalling approximately Rs.318,966. Current case status breakdown: Registered; Under Investigation. Investigating officers are coordinating across Bengaluru Urban, Bengaluru Rural district jurisdictions. CDR analysis reveals significant call traffic between identified members 24-72 hours before each incident, indicating pre-planned operations. The syndicate has been active since 2023-04-19 and continues to pose a significant law and order challenge.

ಬನದನರ ವವತತ, ಇವರದ ಗಣಕಶಕವತ ಪರನರದ ನಶಡದದರಲಲ ಇದರಲಲಯ ಆರದಶಪತನನದ ರನಗನನಥ ರನಮಪನಪ ಗನಗಶಟಟ, ಸನ:ಕಲವಡ
ಇವನದ ಆರ.ಆರ.ಜ ಇಟಟಗ ಭಟಟ ಮನಲಶಕರದ ಇದದದ ಸದರಯವನದ ತನನ ಮನಲಕತತದ ಆರ.ಆರ.ಜ ಇಟಟಗ ಭಟಟ ಯಲಲ ಬನಲ ಕನರರಕ
